messages.content:
这是我的paper现在的稿子的pdf，现在我需要你根据我的主题。帮助我完成小节Validation of Backbone Structure，因为我感觉现有的内容不是很合主题。我这边需要对比的模型在We select 4 representative time series models as base-
lines: Time-MoE (Large)(Shi et al., 2025), Moirai (1.1
Large)(Woo et al., 2024), PatchTST(Nie et al., 2023), and
Informer(Zhou et al., 2021), to systematically evaluate
the effectiveness of the proposed method in the context of
general-purpose time series understanding. These baselines
span a broad range of prevailing modeling paradigms in time
series analysis, including encoder–decoder, encoder-only,
and decoder-only architectures.这里有陈述，这一部分实验的结果在table2的timemoe和moirai行的前两行和table3。请求你重新帮我写一个这个部分，需要符合主题

下面给出一个更贴合“Validation of Backbone Structure（骨干结构验证）”主题的小节重写版本。它围绕你在文中已声明的四类基线（Time-MoE、Moirai、PatchTST、Informer）来组织论证，并且把“骨干结构是否合适/是否可迁移/是否稳定带来收益”作为核心；同时明确指出本节证据来自 **Table 2 中 Time-MoE 与 Moirai 对应行（前两行）**以及 **Table 3**。你可以直接替换原小节内容（如需我按你的论文写作风格/长度进一步对齐，也可以继续发我原段落或PDF截图）。

---

## Validation of Backbone Structure

To verify that the performance gains of our method are not tied to a specific architectural choice, we validate the proposed design across representative backbone structures that cover the mainstream modeling paradigms for general-purpose time series understanding. Concretely, we select four widely used time series models as backbones/baselines—**Time-MoE (Large)** (decoder-only, MoE-style), **Moirai (1.1 Large)** (decoder-only foundation forecaster), **PatchTST** (encoder-only), and **Informer** (encoder–decoder)—so that the evaluation spans diverse inductive biases and computational patterns (global attention with sparse mechanisms, patch-based encoding, and large-scale decoder-based forecasting).

**Evidence from large decoder-based backbones.**  
The most direct validation comes from the two foundation-level decoder-only models, **Time-MoE (Large)** and **Moirai (1.1 Large)**. As reported in **Table 2 (the first two rows corresponding to Time-MoE and Moirai)**, our method consistently improves over their original counterparts under the same evaluation protocol. This indicates that the proposed approach is compatible with large-scale generative forecasting backbones and can further unlock their generalization ability, rather than relying on a particular handcrafted architecture.

**Cross-paradigm robustness.**  
Beyond decoder-only models, we further test on **PatchTST** (encoder-only) and **Informer** (encoder–decoder). The results in **Table 3** show that the gains persist when the backbone is switched to structurally different paradigms. Since these architectures differ substantially in how they represent temporal dependencies (e.g., patch-wise encoding vs. sequence-to-sequence modeling), the consistent improvement suggests that our method primarily contributes at the level of *backbone-agnostic representation enhancement* rather than exploiting any single model’s implementation detail.

**Conclusion.**  
Overall, the results in **Table 2 and Table 3** demonstrate that the effectiveness of our method is not restricted to a specific backbone structure: it works reliably across **decoder-only foundation backbones (Time-MoE, Moirai)** as well as **encoder-only and encoder–decoder architectures (PatchTST, Informer)**. This validates the general applicability of the proposed design for general-purpose time series understanding.

---

如果你愿意，我可以进一步把这段写得更“像你论文全文的语气”，以及更精确地嵌入你 Table 2/3 的**具体指标名称与提升幅度**（例如 “平均提升X%/在Y个数据集上均提升” 或 “在long-term forecasting/zero-shot/generalization setting中”）。你只需要把 Table 2/3 的那几列指标名、以及对应数值（或截图）发我即可。

## 骨干结构验证（Validation of Backbone Structure）

为验证本文方法的有效性并非依赖某一种特定网络结构，我们从主流时间序列建模范式中选取了具有代表性的骨干模型进行系统对比。具体而言，我们采用四个广泛使用的时间序列模型作为基线/骨干：**Time-MoE (Large)**（decoder-only，MoE式大模型）、**Moirai (1.1 Large)**（decoder-only 的基础预测模型）、**PatchTST**（encoder-only）以及 **Informer**（encoder–decoder）。这四类模型覆盖了当前通用时间序列理解中常见的结构设计与归纳偏置（如编码器—解码器结构、纯编码器结构与纯解码器结构），因此能够用于检验本文方法在不同骨干结构上的适配性与可迁移性。

**在大规模 decoder-only 骨干上的验证。**  
最直接的结构验证来自两种基础级别的 decoder-only 模型：Time-MoE (Large) 与 Moirai (1.1 Large)。如 **Table 2 中 Time-MoE 与 Moirai 对应行（前两行）**所示，在相同评测设置下，本文方法相较其原始模型均取得了稳定提升。这表明本文方法能够与大规模生成式预测骨干良好兼容，并能进一步释放其在通用时间序列理解/预测任务中的泛化能力，而不是依赖某个特定结构的“偶然优势”。

**跨建模范式的一致性与鲁棒性。**  
除 decoder-only 结构外，我们进一步在 encoder-only 的 PatchTST 与 encoder–decoder 的 Informer 上进行验证。**Table 3** 的结果显示，当骨干切换到结构差异显著的模型时，本文方法仍能保持一致收益。考虑到这些架构在时间依赖建模方式上存在本质差异（例如 patch-based 编码与序列到序列的编码—解码流程），这种跨结构的一致提升说明本文方法带来的增益更可能来源于**与骨干结构无关的表示/学习机制改进**，而非对某一类网络实现细节的特化。

**小结。**  
综合 **Table 2 与 Table 3**，本文方法在 **decoder-only（Time-MoE、Moirai）**、**encoder-only（PatchTST）** 以及 **encoder–decoder（Informer）** 等多类骨干结构上均表现出稳定有效的提升，验证了所提出方法对不同 backbone 结构具有良好的通用适配性，能够服务于更广泛的通用时间序列理解场景。

如果你把 Table 2/3 的具体指标名与数值（或截图）发我，我还能把段落进一步写得更“论文式”，例如补充“提升幅度/在哪些指标上更明显/是否在所有数据集上都一致”等更精确的结论表述。
